caption: The patients most clinics spend the least time thinking about are often the easiest to bring back.If someone trusted your clinic once, there’s already a relationship there. AI can help you identify patients who are overdue for treatment or follow-ups and make reconnecting with them much easier.The goal isn’t to send robotic messages it’s to save time, stay consistent, and make sure no patient slips through the cracks.Always review every message before sending. Technology should support your patient relationships, not replace them.Follow @dr.aiinpractice for practical AI strategies that help you run tomorrow’s clinic, today.📌 Have you ever reached out to a patient after months or years? What was the response?
